templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about trial session or membership. Looking for a trial, a transfer from another gym, or your first time training? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about trial session or membership. What's the goal — strength, fat loss, sport, just movement? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your trial session or membership enquiry: Got any injuries we should program around? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.
